_comment: Jaeger per-service adaptive sampling strategies — Phase 3 (#396)

default_strategy._comment: 5% default sampling rate for all services

per_operation_strategies._comment: Always sample health checks at 0% (pure noise)
Always sample health checks at 0% (pure noise)

service_strategies._comment: 10% for main service — higher value for user-facing calls
50 traces/sec max for session service (high frequency)
100% sampling for AI/LLM calls — always want trace context for debugging
